#### _Assistant_

> 明白，你把5个页面合并成1个页面，类似一个「全能AI工作台」，上面分3个功能区。我重新设计一下：

#### _User_

> 你先给出设计方案

#### _Assistant_

> 好，设计方案如下：
> 
> ---
> 
> ## 全能AI工作台 — 单页方案
> 
> ### 页面结构（从上到下）
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  ← 全能AI         ⚙️ 设置           │  ← 顶部导航
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  【已开通态】                         │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 全能AI Pro · 至 2026-05-28  │    │  ← 状态卡片
> │  │              剩余日报 5次   │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  【AI消息 - 最新3条 + 查看更多】     │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │🧑 门口有人经过    今天14:32  │    │  ← 消息卡片（可折叠）
> │  │   快递员停留35秒            │    │
> │  ├─────────────────────────────┤    │
> │  │🐱 猫咪跑酷        今天10:15  │    │
> │  ├─────────────────────────────┤    │
> │  │👴 奶奶出门散步    今天08:20  │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │  → 查看全部 x 条消息               │  ← 展开全部
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  【AI日报 - 一键生成 + 今日简报】   │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │  📊 6事件 · 2关注           │    │  ← 日报卡片（若已生成）
> │  │  🕐 08:15 👴奶奶起床 ✅    │    │
> │  │  📸 [2张抓拍]              │    │
> │  │  💡 今天一切正常 👍         │    │
> │  │  [📤分享]  [📆历史日报]     │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │  [ 生成今日日报 ] 剩余5次免费       │  ← 按钮（未生成时）
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  【AI搜索】                         │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 🔍 搜事件：奶奶、猫咪...   │    │  ← 搜索框
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │  今天｜昨天｜本周｜👤人｜🐱宠物｜👴看护│  ← 快捷标签
> │  ┌ 搜索结果列表 ───────────────┐    │
> │  │🧑 门口有人经过   今天14:32  │    │  ← 搜索结果（若有关键词）
> │  │🐱 猫咪跑酷       今天10:15  │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │  💡 试试搜"奶奶做了什么"...         │  ← 搜索建议（初始态）
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  【未开通态 - 替代以上所有内容】      │
> │  Hero横幅 + 套餐选择 + 设备选择      │
> │  + 底部开通按钮                      │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> ### 关键交互
> 
> | 功能 | 交互 |
> |------|------|
> | AI消息 | 顶部展示最新3条，点击可展开全部（抽屉式弹窗或内联展开）。点击某条消息弹出详情弹窗（不跳新页面） |
> | AI日报 | 未生成时显示"生成今日日报"按钮；已生成时展示简报卡片。点击"历史日报"弹出列表弹窗 |
> | AI搜索 | 内嵌搜索框，输入即搜，结果原位展示。点击结果弹出详情弹窗 |
> | 消息详情 | 弹窗形式（van-popup），展示抓拍图 + AI分析 + 操作按钮 + 反馈 |
> | 未开通态 | 完全替换工作台内容，展示Hero + 套餐选择 + 设备选择 + 底部固定开通栏 |
> 
> ### 页面共用的消息详情弹窗
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │          ✕                          │  ← 关闭
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │      抓拍图（16:9）         │    │
> │  │       2026-04-28 14:32      │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │  🤖 AI分析                          │
> │  类型：🧑 人员经过                   │
> │  置信度：98%                        │
> │  描述：快递员在门口停留了35秒       │
> │  判断：✅ 正常活动                  │
> │                                     │
> │  [📥下载] [📤分享] [🎞看录像]     │
> │                                     │
> │  这次分析准确吗？                   │
> │  [👍 准确] [👎 不准确]             │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> ---
> 
> 这个方案把5个页面压缩成1个页面+1个弹窗，所有操作都在同一屏完成。你觉得这个结构OK吗？

#### _User_

> 还要设计一个功能：开通全能Ai后，支持自定义设置关注事件：可添加/删除关注事件，定义关注名称和关键词；大模型会通过识别图片打上关注的标签，从而实现关注事件的日报总结和推送，避免消息轰炸干扰用户正常生活，请先设计方案

#### _Assistant_

> 好的，这个功能本质是**用户自定义关注事件 + 大模型标签匹配 + 基于关注的推送和日报过滤**。先设计方案：
> 
> ---
> 
> ## 关注事件自定义功能 — 设计方案
> 
> ### 1. 产品逻辑
> 
> **核心链路**：
> ```
> 用户设置关注事件 → 大模型识别图片打标签 → 匹配关注事件 → 推送/日报只展示关注的内容
> ```
> 
> **和AI消息推送的关系**：
> - 所有事件仍然进系统，但**推送通知**只发关注事件
> - AI日报**只统计**关注事件
> - 非关注事件在消息列表里折叠展示（"其他事件 x 条"）
> 
> ### 2. 页面入口
> 
> 两个位置进入设置：
> 
> | 入口 | 位置 | 说明 |
> |------|------|------|
> | 工作台导航栏 ⚙️ 设置 | 全能AI工作台右上角 | 全局设置入口 |
> | 消息列表底部 | "其他事件 x 条" 标签旁 | 快捷进入关注管理 |
> 
> ### 3. 关注事件设置页
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  ← 关注事件管理                     │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │  🔍 搜索关注事件...        │    │  ← 搜索已有关注
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  [+ 添加关注事件]                   │  ← 添加按钮
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 我的关注（3） ───              │
> │                                     │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 👴 奶奶的活动               │    │  ← 关注卡片
> │  │ 关键词：奶奶、老人          │    │
> │  │ 今日命中 2 次               │    │
> │  │ [编辑]  [删除]              │    │
> │  ├─────────────────────────────┤    │
> │  │ 🐱 猫咪                     │    │
> │  │ 关键词：猫、猫咪、猫粮     │    │
> │  │ 今日命中 3 次               │    │
> │  │ [编辑]  [删除]              │    │
> │  ├─────────────────────────────┤    │
> │  │ 📦 快递                     │    │
> │  │ 关键词：快递、包裹、送货   │    │
> │  │ 今日命中 1 次               │    │
> │  │ [编辑]  [删除]              │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 不关注的事件（不推送） ───     │
> │  陌生人员经过 · 车辆经过 · ...      │
> │  （建议默认不关注）                 │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> #### 添加/编辑关注弹窗
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  添加关注事件          ✕           │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  关注名称                            │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ e.g. 奶奶的活动             │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  关键词（多个可用逗号分隔）         │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 奶奶, 老人, 拐杖           │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  选择图标                           │
> │  👴 👵 🧑 🐱 🐶 📦 🚪 🚗 🏃...  │
> │                                     │
> │  [取消]          [保存]             │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> ### 4. 大模型标签匹配逻辑
> 
> ```
> 事件图片 → [百炼API] → 返回标签列表 → 匹配用户关注关键词 → 打上关注标签
> ```
> 
> **API调用示例**：
> 
> ```
> 输入：事件图片base64
> 输出：["老人", "奶奶", "客厅", "起床", "行走"]
> 
> 匹配用户关注事件：
>   👴 奶奶的活动 → 关键词 ["奶奶","老人"] → ✅ 匹配 → 标签：奶奶的活动
>   🐱 猫咪 → 关键词 ["猫","猫咪"] → ❌ 不匹配
>   📦 快递 → 关键词 ["快递","包裹"] → ❌ 不匹配
> ```
> 
> **匹配规则**：
> - 标签命中任意一个关键词即算匹配
> - 支持中文分词模糊匹配（"奶奶"可匹配"奶奶"、"老奶奶"）
> - 一图多标签可匹配多个关注事件
> 
> ### 5. 推送和日报过滤规则
> 
> | 场景 | 规则 |
> |------|------|
> | **推送通知** | 仅当事件匹配到**任何一个**关注事件时，才推送通知 |
> | **AI消息列表** | 关注事件按时间展示，非关注事件折叠为"其他事件 x 条" |
> | **AI日报** | 只统计和展示关注事件，非关注事件不纳入日报 |
> | **日报一句话总结** | 基于关注事件生成模板文案 |
> 
> ### 6. 默认关注事件（新用户开通时预置）
> 
> | 事件名称 | 关键词 | 图标 |
> |---------|--------|------|
> | 人员经过 | 人、来人、客人 | 👤 |
> | 宠物活动 | 猫、狗、宠物 | 🐾 |
> | 告警 | 告警、异常、入侵 | ⚠️ |
> 
> 新用户可以删掉或修改默认关注事件。
> 
> ### 7. 初始态工作台改动
> 
> 已开通态的工作台，消息区域改为：
> 
> ```
> ─── 关注事件（新3条） ───
> 🧑 门口有人经过    今天14:32  👤人员经过
> 🐱 猫咪跑酷        今天10:15  🐾宠物活动
> 👴 奶奶出门散步    今天08:20  👤人员经过
> ─── 其他事件 3 条 ───          ← 折叠
> 
> 💡 你还可以自定义关注事件，只接收你关心的消息
> [ 去设置关注事件 ]
> ```
> 
> ---
> 
> 总结：这个功能的核心价值是**给用户自主权过滤消息**，避免全天摄像头把所有动静都推送过来，只让用户收到**自己在意的**事件。
> 
> 你觉得这个方案OK吗？OK的话我直接按这个改代码。

#### _User_

> 全能Ai这个入口如果开通了应该就变成配置功能了（配置推送和关注事件，关注事件支持开启/关闭/编辑/删除；显示套餐及到期时间），实际功能服务体现应该在消息页
> 1、消息页显示所有消息
> 2、生成日报按钮文案：消息太多？一键总结；点击进入日报总结页面，总结关注事件和其他的数量以及汇总文案报告，支持查看每个关注事件的详情消息列表； 支持查看历史生成的报告，需显示日期
> 3、Ai搜索

#### _Assistant_

> 明白了。重新理一下设计方案：
> 
> ---
> 
> ## 全能AI方案（修订版）
> 
> ### 入口按钮行为
> 
> | 状态 | 点击 → 跳转 |
> |------|-----------|
> | 未开通 | 开通/购买页 |
> | 已开通（Basic/Pro） | 全能AI配置页 |
> 
> ### 1. 配置页（原「AI」入口的目的地）
> 
> **位置**：首页设备操作栏 → AI按钮（已开通态）
> 
> **页面内容**：
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  ← 全能AI配置                       │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 全能AI Pro · 至 2026-05-28 │    │  ← 套餐状态卡片
> │  │             剩余日报 5次   │    │
> │  │        [升级Pro]           │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 推送设置 ───                   │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 紧急推送            [开]    │    │
> │  │ 普通推送            [开]    │    │
> │  │ 每日最多推送数     5条 →    │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 关注事件管理 ───               │
> │  [+ 添加关注事件]                    │
> │                                     │
> │  👤 人员经过          [开] [编辑][删]│  ← 默认关注
> │  🐾 宠物活动          [开] [编辑][删]│
> │  ⚠️ 告警              [开] [编辑][删]│
> │  ─────────────────────────────       │
> │  👴 奶奶的活动        [开] [编辑][删]│  ← 用户自定义
> │  📦 快递              [开] [编辑][删]│
> │                                     │
> │  点击"添加关注事件"→ 弹窗           │
> │  ┌─ 添加关注 ────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 关注名称：________        │    │
> │  │ 关键词：________          │    │
> │  │ 图标选择：[👴][👵][🧑]...│    │
> │  │ [取消]      [保存]       │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> **配置页交互**：
> - 关注事件列表支持**开关**（推送开关，关闭则不推送该事件）
> - 支持**编辑**（改名称/关键词/图标）、**删除**
> - 编辑/添加用弹窗形式
> 
> ---
> 
> ### 2. 消息页（原页面B，不改变入口路径）
> 
> **位置**：底部Tab「消息」或设备操作栏「消息」
> 
> **页面改动**：
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  🔍 AI搜索 [搜事件：奶奶、猫咪...] │  ← AI搜索直接嵌入消息页顶部
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  今天｜昨天｜本周｜👤人｜🐱宠物｜  │  ← 搜索快捷标签
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  ─── 关注事件（3条新消息） ───     │
> │  🧑 门口有人经过    今天14:32      │
> │  🐱 猫咪跑酷        今天10:15      │
> │  👴 奶奶出门散步    今天08:20      │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 其他事件（2条） ───           │  ← 不关注的事件折叠
> │  车辆经过 · 风声扰动               │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  [📋 消息太多？一键生成日报]        │  ← 生成日报入口
> │          剩余5次免费                │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> **关键改动**：
> - **AI搜索**直接嵌入消息页顶部搜索框，不再是独立页面
> - 消息按"关注事件"和"其他事件"分组展示
> - 底部有一键生成日报的入口按钮
> 
> ---
> 
> ### 3. 日报总结页（点击「一键生成日报」进入）
> 
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  ← AI日报总结                       │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │          2026年4月28日              │
> │     已生成 [📤分享]                 │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  📊 今日概况                        │
> │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐    │
> │  │ 关注事件 6件   其他 3件     │    │
> │  │ 总共 9 个事件               │    │
> │  └─────────────────────────────┘    │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 关注事件详情 ───               │
> │  👴 奶奶的活动（2件） → 查看详情    │  ← 点击展开列表
> │  🐱 猫咪（3件） → 查看详情          │
> │  📦 快递（1件） → 查看详情          │
> │                                     │
> │  ─── 其他事件（3件） ───            │
> │  车辆经过 2次 · 风声 1次            │
> │                                     │
> │  🕐 时间线                          │
> │  08:15 👴 奶奶起床 ✅               │
> │  10:00 🧑 快递员放件 📦            │
> │  14:00 🐱 猫咪跑酷 🏃              │
> │  16:20 👴 奶奶出门 🚶              │
> │  18:30 👴 奶奶回家 🏠              │
> │                                     │
> │  💡 一句话总结                      │
> │  今天一切正常，奶奶出门1次，         │
> │  猫咪很活跃 🐾                      │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  📆 历史报告                        │
> │  4月27日 →                           │
> │  4月26日 →                           │
> │  4月25日 →                           │
> │  [查看更多]                          │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> **「查看详情」→ 弹窗展示该关注事件的消息列表**：
> ```
> ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
> │  👴 奶奶的活动（2条）    ✕         │
> ├─────────────────────────────────────┤
> │  🧑 奶奶出门散步    16:20          │
> │  🧑 奶奶起床        08:15          │
> │  [查看更多]                         │
> └─────────────────────────────────────┘
> ```
> 
> ---
> 
> ### 4. 页面汇总
> 
> | 页面 | 功能 | 备注 |
> |------|------|------|
> | **AI配置页** ( `/ai` ) | 套餐状态 + 推送设置 + 关注事件管理 | 已开通态入口 |
> | **消息页** ( `/message` ) | 嵌入AI搜索 + 消息列表（关注/其他分组） + 生成日报入口 | 改造现有消息页 |
> | **日报总结页** ( `/ai/daily` ) | 日报展示 + 关注事件详情列表 + 历史日报 | 点击生成后进入 |
> | **未开通态** | 仍然是开通购买页 | 在 `/ai` 路由中 |
> 
> 这样结构更清晰：
> - **配置**和**功能消费**分离
> - 消息页不跳转，AI搜索嵌入消息页
> - 日报作为独立页，但只用于查看和总结
> - 关注事件管理在配置页统一管理

>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/battery',> 
>     name: 'Battery',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/battery/index.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '电池管理' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/smart-schedule',> 
>     name: 'SmartSchedule',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/battery/schedule.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '智能模式' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/battery-stats',> 
>     name: 'BatteryStats',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/battery/stats.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '运行统计' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/login',> 
>     name: 'Login',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/login/index.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '登录' }> 
>   },> 
>   // ===== 全能AI =====> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/ai',> 
>     name: 'AiHome',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/ai/index.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '全能AI' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/ai/message',> 
>     name: 'AiMessage',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/ai/message.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: 'AI消息' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/ai/daily',> 
>     name: 'AiDaily',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/ai/daily.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: 'AI日报' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/ai/search',> 
>     name: 'AiSearch',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/ai/search.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: 'AI搜索' }> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/ai/detail',> 
>     name: 'AiDetail',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/ai/detail.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '事件详情' }> 
>   },> 
>   // ===== 404 =====> 
>   {> 
>     path: '/:pathMatch(.*)*',> 
>     name: 'NotFound',> 
>     component: () => import('@/views/error/404.vue'),> 
>     meta: { title: '页面不存在' }> 
>   }> 
> ]> 
> > 
> const router = createRouter({> 
>   history: createWebHistory(),> 
>   routes> 
> })> 
> > 
> // 路由守卫> 
> router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {> 
>   document.title = to.meta.title ? `${to.meta.title} - CareCam Pro` : 'CareCam Pro'> 
>   next()> 
> })> 
> > 
> export default router> 
> >

> <script setup>> 
> import { ref, computed } from 'vue'> 
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'> 
> > 
> const router = useRouter()> 
> > 
> // 搜索> 
> const searchText = ref('')> 
> > 
> // 日期选择> 
> const showDatePicker = ref(false)> 
> const selectedDate = ref(['2024', '04', '20'])> 
> const dateLabel = ref('全部日期')> 
> > 
> // 筛选> 
> const showFilterPanel = ref(false)> 
> const deviceOptions = ['全部设备', 'Front Door', 'Backyard', 'Garage']> 
> const eventOptions = ['全部事件', '人形', '移动', '车辆', '声音', '包裹', '动物']> 
> const selectedDevices = ref(['全部设备'])> 
> const selectedEvents = ref(['全部事件'])> 
> const filterCount = ref(0)> 
> > 
> // 消息列表> 
> const messages = ref([> 
>   {> 
>     id: 1,> 
>     type: '检测到人形',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 09:38',> 
>     tag: '人形',> 
>     tagType: 'person',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 2,> 
>     type: '检测到移动',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '今天 09:20',> 
>     tag: '移动',> 
>     tagType: 'motion',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 3,> 
>     type: '检测到车辆',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 08:55',> 
>     tag: '车辆',> 
>     tagType: 'vehicle',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 4,> 
>     type: '声音告警',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '昨天 22:14',> 
>     tag: '声音',> 
>     tagType: 'sound',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 5,> 
>     type: '检测到人形',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '昨天 20:02',> 
>     tag: '人形',> 
>     tagType: 'person',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   }> 
> ])> 
> > 
> // 筛选后的消息> 
> const filteredMessages = computed(() => {> 
>   return messages.value> 
> })> 
> > 
> // 日期确认> 
> const onDateConfirm = ({ selectedValues }) => {> 
>   dateLabel.value = `${selectedValues[1]}月${selectedValues[2]}日`> 
>   showDatePicker.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换设备筛选> 
> const toggleDevice = (device) => {> 
>   if (device === '全部设备') {> 
>     selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(device)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedDevices.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedDevices.value = selectedDevices.value.filter(d => d !== '全部设备')> 
>       selectedDevices.value.push(device)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换事件筛选> 
> const toggleEvent = (event) => {> 
>   if (event === '全部事件') {> 
>     selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedEvents.value.indexOf(event)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedEvents.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedEvents.value = selectedEvents.value.filter(e => e !== '全部事件')> 
>       selectedEvents.value.push(event)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 重置筛选> 
> const resetFilter = () => {> 
>   selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   filterCount.value = 0> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 应用筛选> 
> const applyFilter = () => {> 
>   let count = 0> 
>   if (!selectedDevices.value.includes('全部设备')) {> 
>     count += selectedDevices.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   if (!selectedEvents.value.includes('全部事件')) {> 
>     count += selectedEvents.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   filterCount.value = count> 
>   showFilterPanel.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转消息详情> 
> const goToMessageDetail = (msg) => {> 
>   // 可以跳转到消息详情页> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转服务商城> 
> const goToStore = () => {> 
>   router.push('/store')> 
> }> 
> </script>>

>           placeholder="AI 搜索 — 描述发生了什么..."> 
>         />> 
>         <span class="ai-tag">AI</span>> 
>         <van-icon name="audio" size="17" color="#1A73E8" />> 
>       </div>> 
>       > 
>       <!-- 日期和筛选 -->> 
>       <div class="filter-row">> 
>         <div class="filter-trigger" @click="showDatePicker = true">> 
>           <van-icon name="calendar-o" size="14" color="#6B7280" />> 
>           <span>{{ dateLabel }}</span>> 
>           <van-icon name="arrow-down" size="12" color="#6B7280" />> 
>         </div>> 
>         <div class="filter-trigger" @click="showFilterPanel = true">> 
>           <van-icon name="filter-o" size="14" color="#6B7280" />> 
>           <span>筛选</span>> 
>           <span v-if="filterCount > 0" class="filter-badge">{{ filterCount }}</span>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 消息列表 -->> 
>     <div class="msg-list">> 
>       <div > 
>         v-for="msg in filteredMessages" > 
>         :key="msg.id"> 
>         class="msg-item"> 
>         @click="goToMessageDetail(msg)"> 
>       >> 
>         <div class="msg-thumb" :style="{ background: msg.bgGradient }"></div>> 
>         <div class="msg-content">> 
>           <div class="msg-type">{{ msg.type }}</div>> 
>           <div class="msg-device">{{ msg.deviceName }}</div>> 
>           <div class="msg-time">{{ msg.time }}</div>> 
>           <span :class="['msg-tag', `tag-${msg.tagType}`]">{{ msg.tag }}</span>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 底部营销提示 -->> 
>     <div class="bottom-tip">> 
>       <div class="tip-content" @click="goToStore">> 
>         <van-icon name="info-o" size="14" color="#1A73E8" />> 
>         <span>开通智能服务，畅享更多智能服务及精彩回看</span>> 
>         <van-icon name="arrow" size="12" color="#1A73E8" />> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 日期选择器 -->> 
>     <van-popup > 
>       v-model:show="showDatePicker" > 
>       position="bottom" > 
>       round> 
>     >> 
>       <van-date-picker > 
>         v-model="selectedDate"> 
>         title="选择日期"> 
>         @confirm="onDateConfirm"> 
>         @cancel="showDatePicker = false"> 
>       />> 
>     </van-popup>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 筛选面板 -->> 
>     <van-popup > 
>       v-model:show="showFilterPanel" > 
>       position="bottom" > 
>       round> 
>       :style="{ height: '50%' }"> 
>     >> 
>       <div class="filter-panel">> 
>         <div class="panel-header">> 
>           <span>筛选</span>> 
>           <van-icon name="cross" size="20" @click="showFilterPanel = false" />> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="filter-section">> 
>           <div class="section-title">设备</div>> 
>           <div class="chips">> 
>             <span > 
>               v-for="(device, index) in deviceOptions" > 
>               :key="index"> 
>               :class="['chip', { active: selectedDevices.includes(device) }]"> 
>               @click="toggleDevice(device)"> 
>             >> 
>               {{ device }}> 
>             </span>> 
>           </div>> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="filter-section">> 
>           <div class="section-title">事件类型</div>> 
>           <div class="chips">> 
>             <span > 
>               v-for="(event, index) in eventOptions" > 
>               :key="index"> 
>               :class="['chip', { active: selectedEvents.includes(event) }]"> 
>               @click="toggleEvent(event)"> 
>             >> 
>               {{ event }}> 
>             </span>> 
>           </div>> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="panel-actions">> 
>           <van-button block plain @click="resetFilter">重置</van-button>> 
>           <van-button block type="primary" @click="applyFilter">应用</van-button>>

> <script setup>> 
> import { ref, computed } from 'vue'> 
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'> 
> > 
> const router = useRouter()> 
> > 
> // 搜索> 
> const searchText = ref('')> 
> > 
> // 日期选择> 
> const showDatePicker = ref(false)> 
> const selectedDate = ref(['2024', '04', '20'])> 
> const dateLabel = ref('全部日期')> 
> > 
> // 筛选> 
> const showFilterPanel = ref(false)> 
> const deviceOptions = ['全部设备', 'Front Door', 'Backyard', 'Garage']> 
> const eventOptions = ['全部事件', '人形', '移动', '车辆', '声音', '包裹', '动物']> 
> const selectedDevices = ref(['全部设备'])> 
> const selectedEvents = ref(['全部事件'])> 
> const filterCount = ref(0)> 
> > 
> // 消息列表> 
> const messages = ref([> 
>   {> 
>     id: 1,> 
>     type: '检测到人形',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 09:38',> 
>     tag: '人形',> 
>     tagType: 'person',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 2,> 
>     type: '检测到移动',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '今天 09:20',> 
>     tag: '移动',> 
>     tagType: 'motion',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 3,> 
>     type: '检测到车辆',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 08:55',> 
>     tag: '车辆',> 
>     tagType: 'vehicle',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 4,> 
>     type: '声音告警',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '昨天 22:14',> 
>     tag: '声音',> 
>     tagType: 'sound',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)'> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 5,> 
>     type: '检测到人形',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '昨天 20:02',> 
>     tag: '人形',> 
>     tagType: 'person',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)'> 
>   }> 
> ])> 
> > 
> // 筛选后的消息> 
> const filteredMessages = computed(() => {> 
>   return messages.value> 
> })> 
> > 
> // 日期确认> 
> const onDateConfirm = ({ selectedValues }) => {> 
>   dateLabel.value = `${selectedValues[1]}月${selectedValues[2]}日`> 
>   showDatePicker.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换设备筛选> 
> const toggleDevice = (device) => {> 
>   if (device === '全部设备') {> 
>     selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(device)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedDevices.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedDevices.value = selectedDevices.value.filter(d => d !== '全部设备')> 
>       selectedDevices.value.push(device)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换事件筛选> 
> const toggleEvent = (event) => {> 
>   if (event === '全部事件') {> 
>     selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedEvents.value.indexOf(event)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedEvents.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedEvents.value = selectedEvents.value.filter(e => e !== '全部事件')> 
>       selectedEvents.value.push(event)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 重置筛选> 
> const resetFilter = () => {> 
>   selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   filterCount.value = 0> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 应用筛选> 
> const applyFilter = () => {> 
>   let count = 0> 
>   if (!selectedDevices.value.includes('全部设备')) {> 
>     count += selectedDevices.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   if (!selectedEvents.value.includes('全部事件')) {> 
>     count += selectedEvents.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   filterCount.value = count> 
>   showFilterPanel.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转消息详情> 
> const goToMessageDetail = (msg) => {> 
>   // 可以跳转到消息详情页> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转服务商城> 
> const goToStore = () => {> 
>   router.push('/store')> 
> }> 
> </script>>

> | `views/message/index.vue` | 消息列表按"关注事件"和"其他事件"分组展示；底部用**日报生成按钮**替换原营销提示 |

>     <div class="search-wrap">> 
>       <div class="search-box">> 
>         <van-icon name="search" size="17" color="#6B7280" />> 
>         <input > 
>           type="text" > 
>           v-model="searchText" > 
>           placeholder="AI 搜索 — 描述发生了什么..."> 
>         />> 
>         <span class="ai-tag">AI</span>> 
>         <van-icon name="audio" size="17" color="#1A73E8" />> 
>       </div>> 
>       > 
>       <!-- 日期和筛选 -->> 
>       <div class="filter-row">> 
>         <div class="filter-trigger" @click="showDatePicker = true">> 
>           <van-icon name="calendar-o" size="14" color="#6B7280" />> 
>           <span>{{ dateLabel }}</span>> 
>           <van-icon name="arrow-down" size="12" color="#6B7280" />> 
>         </div>> 
>         <div class="filter-trigger" @click="showFilterPanel = true">> 
>           <van-icon name="filter-o" size="14" color="#6B7280" />> 
>           <span>筛选</span>> 
>           <span v-if="filterCount > 0" class="filter-badge">{{ filterCount }}</span>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>         <!-- 消息列表 -->> 
>     <div class="msg-list">> 
>       <!-- 关注事件分组 -->> 
>       <div class="group-label">关注事件（{{ focusMessages.length }}条）</div>> 
>       <div > 
>         v-for="msg in focusMessages" > 
>         :key="msg.id"> 
>         class="msg-item"> 
>         @click="goToMessageDetail(msg)"> 
>       >> 
>         <div class="msg-thumb" :style="{ background: msg.bgGradient }"></div>> 
>         <div class="msg-content">> 
>           <div class="msg-type">{{ msg.type }}</div>> 
>           <div class="msg-device">{{ msg.deviceName }}</div>> 
>           <div class="msg-time">{{ msg.time }}</div>> 
>           <span :class="['msg-tag', `tag-${msg.tagType}`]">{{ msg.tag }}</span>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>       > 
>       <!-- 其他事件折叠 -->> 
>       <div class="divider-row" @click="showOther = !showOther">> 
>         <span class="divider-line"></span>> 
>         <span class="divider-text">{{ showOther ? '收起' : '其他事件 ' + otherMessages.length + ' 条' }}</span>> 
>         <span class="divider-line"></span>> 
>       </div>> 
>       > 
>       <div v-if="showOther">> 
>         <div > 
>           v-for="msg in otherMessages" > 
>           :key="msg.id"> 
>           class="msg-item other-msg"> 
>           @click="goToMessageDetail(msg)"> 
>         >> 
>           <div class="msg-thumb" :style="{ background: msg.bgGradient }"></div>> 
>           <div class="msg-content">> 
>             <div class="msg-type">{{ msg.type }}</div>> 
>             <div class="msg-device">{{ msg.deviceName }}</div>> 
>             <div class="msg-time">{{ msg.time }}</div>> 
>             <span :class="['msg-tag', `tag-${msg.tagType}`]">{{ msg.tag }}</span>> 
>           </div>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 底部：一键日报 -->> 
>     <div class="bottom-actions">> 
>       <button class="daily-btn" @click="goToDaily">> 
>         <van-icon name="notes-o" size="16" color="#fff" />> 
>         <span>消息太多？一键总结</span>> 
>       </button>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 日期选择器 -->> 
>     <van-popup > 
>       v-model:show="showDatePicker" > 
>       position="bottom" > 
>       round> 
>     >> 
>       <van-date-picker > 
>         v-model="selectedDate"> 
>         title="选择日期"> 
>         @confirm="onDateConfirm"> 
>         @cancel="showDatePicker = false"> 
>       />> 
>     </van-popup>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 筛选面板 -->> 
>     <van-popup > 
>       v-model:show="showFilterPanel" > 
>       position="bottom" > 
>       round> 
>       :style="{ height: '50%' }"> 
>     >> 
>       <div class="filter-panel">> 
>         <div class="panel-header">> 
>           <span>筛选</span>> 
>           <van-icon name="cross" size="20" @click="showFilterPanel = false" />> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="filter-section">> 
>           <div class="section-title">设备</div>> 
>           <div class="chips">> 
>             <span > 
>               v-for="(device, index) in deviceOptions" > 
>               :key="index"> 
>               :class="['chip', { active: selectedDevices.includes(device) }]"> 
>               @click="toggleDevice(device)"> 
>             >> 
>               {{ device }}> 
>             </span>> 
>           </div>> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="filter-section">> 
>           <div class="section-title">事件类型</div>> 
>           <div class="chips">> 
>             <span > 
>               v-for="(event, index) in eventOptions" > 
>               :key="index"> 
>               :class="['chip', { active: selectedEvents.includes(event) }]"> 
>               @click="toggleEvent(event)"> 
>             >> 
>               {{ event }}> 
>             </span>> 
>           </div>> 
>         </div>> 
>         > 
>         <div class="panel-actions">> 
>           <van-button block plain @click="resetFilter">重置</van-button>> 
>           <van-button block type="primary" @click="applyFilter">应用</van-button>> 
>         </div>> 
>       </div>> 
>     </van-popup>> 
>   </div>> 
> </template>> 
> > 
> <script setup>> 
> import { ref, computed } from 'vue'> 
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'> 
> > 
> const router = useRouter()> 
> > 
> // 搜索> 
> const searchText = ref('')> 
> > 
> // 日期选择> 
> const showDatePicker = ref(false)> 
> const selectedDate = ref(['2024', '04', '20'])> 
> const dateLabel = ref('全部日期')> 
> > 
> // 筛选> 
> const showFilterPanel = ref(false)> 
> const deviceOptions = ['全部设备', 'Front Door', 'Backyard', 'Garage']> 
> const eventOptions = ['全部事件', '人形', '移动', '车辆', '声音', '包裹', '动物']> 
> const selectedDevices = ref(['全部设备'])> 
> const selectedEvents = ref(['全部事件'])> 
> const filterCount = ref(0)> 
> > 
> // 消息列表> 
> const messages = ref([> 
>   {> 
>     id: 1,> 
>     type: '🐱 猫咪在客厅跑酷',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 09:38',> 
>     tag: '关注',> 
>     tagType: 'person',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)',> 
>     isFocus: true> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 2,> 
>     type: '👴 奶奶出门散步',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '今天 09:20',> 
>     tag: '关注',> 
>     tagType: 'motion',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)',> 
>     isFocus: true> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 3,> 
>     type: '🧑 门口有人经过',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '今天 08:55',> 
>     tag: '关注',> 
>     tagType: 'vehicle',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)',> 
>     isFocus: true> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 4,> 
>     type: '声音告警',> 
>     deviceName: 'Backyard',> 
>     time: '昨天 22:14',> 
>     tag: '声音',> 
>     tagType: 'sound',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2e1a, #1a5c34)',> 
>     isFocus: false> 
>   },> 
>   {> 
>     id: 5,> 
>     type: '检测到车辆',> 
>     deviceName: 'Front Door',> 
>     time: '昨天 20:02',> 
>     tag: '车辆',> 
>     tagType: 'vehicle',> 
>     bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b3e, #1a3a6e)',> 
>     isFocus: false> 
>   }> 
> ])> 
> > 
> const showOther = ref(false)> 
> > 
> // 关注事件> 
> const focusMessages = computed(() => messages.value.filter(m => m.isFocus))> 
> > 
> // 其他事件> 
> const otherMessages = computed(() => messages.value.filter(m => !m.isFocus))> 
> > 
> // 未筛选前就是所有消息> 
> const filteredMessages = computed(() => messages.value)> 
> > 
> // 日期确认> 
> const onDateConfirm = ({ selectedValues }) => {> 
>   dateLabel.value = `${selectedValues[1]}月${selectedValues[2]}日`> 
>   showDatePicker.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换设备筛选> 
> const toggleDevice = (device) => {> 
>   if (device === '全部设备') {> 
>     selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(device)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedDevices.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedDevices.value = selectedDevices.value.filter(d => d !== '全部设备')> 
>       selectedDevices.value.push(device)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 切换事件筛选> 
> const toggleEvent = (event) => {> 
>   if (event === '全部事件') {> 
>     selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   } else {> 
>     const index = selectedEvents.value.indexOf(event)> 
>     if (index > -1) {> 
>       selectedEvents.value.splice(index, 1)> 
>     } else {> 
>       selectedEvents.value = selectedEvents.value.filter(e => e !== '全部事件')> 
>       selectedEvents.value.push(event)> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 重置筛选> 
> const resetFilter = () => {> 
>   selectedDevices.value = ['全部设备']> 
>   selectedEvents.value = ['全部事件']> 
>   filterCount.value = 0> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 应用筛选> 
> const applyFilter = () => {> 
>   let count = 0> 
>   if (!selectedDevices.value.includes('全部设备')) {> 
>     count += selectedDevices.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   if (!selectedEvents.value.includes('全部事件')) {> 
>     count += selectedEvents.value.length> 
>   }> 
>   filterCount.value = count> 
>   showFilterPanel.value = false> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转消息详情> 
> const goToMessageDetail = (msg) => {> 
>   // 可以跳转到消息详情页> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转服务商城> 
> const goToStore = () => {> 
>   router.push('/store')> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 跳转AI日报> 
> const goToDaily = () => {> 
>   router.push('/ai/daily')> 
> }> 
> </script>> 
> > 
> <style lang="scss" scoped>> 
> .message-page {> 
>   min-height: 100%;> 
>   background-color: $bg-page;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   flex-direction: column;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .search-wrap {> 
>   background-color: $bg-color;> 
>   padding: 12px 16px;> 
>   border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color;> 
>   flex-shrink: 0;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .search-box {> 
>   background-color: $bg-page;> 
>   border-radius: $radius-md;> 
>   padding: 9px 14px;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   align-items: center;> 
>   gap: 10px;> 
>   margin-bottom: 12px;> 
>   > 
>   input {> 
>     flex: 1;> 
>     border: none;> 
>     outline: none;> 
>     font-size: 14px;> 
>     color: $text-primary;> 
>     background-color: transparent;> 
>     > 
>     &::placeholder {> 
>       color: $text-secondary;> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .ai-tag {> 
>   padding: 2px 8px;> 
>   border-radius: 10px;> 
>   font-size: 10px;> 
>   font-weight: 700;> 
>   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A73E8, #9C27B0);> 
>   color: #fff;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .filter-row {> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   gap: 8px;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .filter-trigger {> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   align-items: center;> 
>   gap: 6px;> 
>   padding: 6px 12px;> 
>   border-radius: $radius-pill;> 
>   border: 1.5px solid $border-color;> 
>   background-color: $bg-page;> 
>   cursor: pointer;> 
>   > 
>   span {> 
>     font-size: 12px;> 
>     font-weight: 500;> 
>     color: $text-primary;> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   .filter-badge {> 
>     background-color: $primary-color;> 
>     color: #fff;> 
>     border-radius: 10px;> 
>     font-size: 10px;> 
>     font-weight: 700;> 
>     padding: 1px 6px;> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-list {> 
>   flex: 1;> 
>   padding: 12px 16px;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   flex-direction: column;> 
>   gap: 10px;> 
>   overflow-y: auto;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .group-label {> 
>   font-size: 13px;> 
>   font-weight: 600;> 
>   color: $text-primary;> 
>   padding: 4px 0 2px;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-item {> 
>   background-color: $bg-card;> 
>   border-radius: $radius-lg;> 
>   padding: 12px;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   gap: 12px;> 
>   align-items: flex-start;> 
>   box-shadow: $shadow-card;> 
>   > 
>   &.other-msg {> 
>     opacity: 0.75;> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-thumb {> 
>   width: 72px;> 
>   height: 54px;> 
>   border-radius: 10px;> 
>   flex-shrink: 0;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-content {> 
>   flex: 1;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-type {> 
>   font-size: 13px;> 
>   font-weight: 600;> 
>   color: $text-primary;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-device {> 
>   font-size: 11px;> 
>   color: $text-secondary;> 
>   margin-top: 2px;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-time {> 
>   font-size: 11px;> 
>   color: $text-secondary;> 
>   margin-top: 3px;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .msg-tag {> 
>   display: inline-block;> 
>   padding: 2px 8px;> 
>   border-radius: 10px;> 
>   font-size: 10px;> 
>   font-weight: 600;> 
>   margin-top: 4px;> 
>   > 
>   &.tag-person {> 
>     background-color: #DBEAFE;> 
>     color: #1D4ED8;> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   &.tag-motion {> 
>     background-color: #FEF3C7;> 
>     color: #D97706;> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   &.tag-vehicle {> 
>     background-color: #EDE9FE;> 
>     color: #6D28D9;> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   &.tag-sound {> 
>     background-color: #D1FAE5;> 
>     color: #065F46;> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .bottom-actions {> 
>   background-color: $bg-color;> 
>   border-top: 1px solid $border-color;> 
>   padding: 10px 16px;> 
>   padding-bottom: calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 8px));> 
>   flex-shrink: 0;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .daily-btn {> 
>   width: 100%;> 
>   padding: 12px;> 
>   border: none;> 
>   border-radius: $radius-md;> 
>   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A73E8, #9C27B0);> 
>   color: #fff;> 
>   font-size: 14px;> 
>   font-weight: 600;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   align-items: center;> 
>   justify-content: center;> 
>   gap: 8px;> 
>   cursor: pointer;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .filter-panel {> 
>   padding: 16px;> 
>   > 
>   .panel-header {> 
>     display: flex;> 
>     justify-content: space-between;> 
>     align-items: center;> 
>     margin-bottom: 16px;> 
>     > 
>     span {> 
>       font-size: 16px;> 
>       font-weight: 700;> 
>       color: $text-primary;> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   .filter-section {> 
>     margin-bottom: 16px;> 
>     > 
>     .section-title {> 
>       font-size: 12px;> 
>       font-weight: 600;> 
>       color: $text-secondary;> 
>       margin-bottom: 8px;> 
>     }> 
>     > 
>     .chips {> 
>       display: flex;> 
>       flex-wrap: wrap;> 
>       gap: 8px;> 
>     }> 
>     > 
>     .chip {> 
>       padding: 5px 12px;> 
>       border-radius: $radius-pill;> 
>       font-size: 12px;> 
>       font-weight: 500;> 
>       border: 1.5px solid $border-color;> 
>       color: $text-secondary;> 
>       background-color: $bg-page;> 
>       > 
>       &.active {> 
>         background-color: $primary-color;> 
>         color: #fff;> 
>         border-color: $primary-color;> 
>       }> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   .panel-actions {> 
>     display: flex;> 
>     gap: 10px;> 
>     margin-top: 20px;> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .divider-row {> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   align-items: center;> 
>   gap: 10px;> 
>   padding: 12px 4px;> 
>   cursor: pointer;> 
> }> 
> .divider-line { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: $border-color; }> 
> .divider-text { font-size: 12px; color: $text-secondary; white-space: nowrap; }> 
> </style>>

> <script setup>
> import { ref } from 'vue'
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
> 
> const router = useRouter()
> const isActivated = ref(false)
> const planType = ref('basic')
> const selectedPlan = ref('basic')
> const payMethod = ref('wechat')
> const showPay = ref(false)
> const showUpgrade = ref(false)
> const showSettings = ref(false)
> const remainReports = ref(5)
> const validUntil = ref('2026-05-28')
> 
> const deviceList = ref([
>   { id: 'frontdoor', name: 'Front Door' },
>   { id: 'backyard', name: 'Backyard' },
>   { id: 'garage', name: 'Garage' }
> ])
> const selectedDevices = ref(['frontdoor', 'backyard', 'garage'])
> 
> const toggleDevice = (id) => {
>   const idx = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(id)
>   if (idx > -1) selectedDevices.value.splice(idx, 1)
>   else selectedDevices.value.push(id)
> }
> 
> const goBack = () => router.back()
> 
> const confirmPay = () => {
>   showPay.value = false
>   isActivated.value = true
> }
> 
> const handleUpgrade = () => {
>   showUpgrade.value = false
>   planType.value = 'pro'
>   remainReports.value = 20
> }
> 
> const goToMsg = () => router.push('/ai/message')
> const goToDaily = () => router.push('/ai/daily')
> const goToSearch = () => router.push('/ai/search')
> </script>
>

>   &.selected { border-color: $primary-color; background: $primary-bg; }
>   &.pro {

>     .plan-badge { position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9C27B0, #7B1FA2); color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; }

> }

> .check-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; &:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .dev-name { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: $text-primary; } .check-box { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; border: 2px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.2s; &.checked { background: $primary-color; border-color: $primary-color; } } }
>

> 
> .status-card { margin: 16px; background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: $shadow-card; }
> .status-top { padding: 16px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; }
> .status-plan { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; }
> .status-date { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-top: 2px; }
> .remain-area { text-align: center; }
> .remain-num { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: $primary-color; }
> .remain-label { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; }
> 
> .entry-grid { margin: 0 16px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
> .entry-card { background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; padding: 16px; box-shadow: $shadow-card; cursor: pointer; &:active { transform: scale(0.97); } &.disabled { opacity: 0.6; } .entry-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; &.msg { background: #E8F0FE; } &.daily { background: #FEF3C7; } &.search { background: #EDE9FE; } &.disabled { background: $border-color; } } .entry-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } .entry-desc { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-top: 2px; } }
> 
> .pay-popup, .upgrade-popup { padding: 20px 16px 32px; }
> .popup-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; } }
> .pay-amount { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; color: $primary-color; }
> .pay-plan { font-size: 13px; color: $text-secondary; margin-bottom: 4px; }
> .pay-devices { font-size: 12px; color: $text-secondary; margin-bottom: 20px; }
> .pay-options { margin-bottom: 16px; }
> .pay-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 12px; border: 2px solid $border-color; border-radius: $radius-md; margin-bottom: 10px; transition: border-color 0.2s; &.selected { border-color: $primary-color; } .pay-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } span { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } .radio { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } &.selected .radio { border-color: $primary-color; background: $primary-color; &::after { content: ''; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; } } }
> 
> .upgrade-feats { margin-bottom: 20px; }
> .ufeat { padding: 10px 0; font-size: 14px; color: $text-primary; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; }
> </style>

#### _Assistant_

> 编译通过。现在在 `/ai` 页面右侧有一个浮动的调试面板：
> 
> - **⚙ 按钮**（右侧半圆蓝色图标 36x36）→ 点击展开面板
> - **三个状态选项**：
>   - 未开通全能AI → 显示购买页
>   - 已开通全能AI Basic → 显示配置页（Basic）
>   - 已开通全能AI Pro → 显示配置页（Pro，日报次数20次）
> 
> 点击任一状态自动切换内容并收起面板。默认是"已开通全能AI Basic"。
> 
> 需要我同样在消息页（`/message`）和日报页（`/ai/daily`）也加这样的状态切换吗？或者你后续需要加更多状态，告诉我就行。

#### _User_

> 建议这个切换按钮置顶显示，并不一定要放在页面内部做切换

#### _Assistant_

> 明白，在页面顶部做状态切换条，类似一个标签栏。

>           </div>
>           <div v-if="planType === 'basic'" class="upgrade-row" @click="showUpgrade = true">
>             <span>升级Pro解锁AI搜索和更多日报次数</span><van-icon name="arrow" size="14" color="#1A73E8" />
>           </div>
>         </div>
> 
>         <div class="config-section">
>           <div class="config-section-title">推送设置</div>
>           <div class="config-item"><span>紧急推送（安静时段不推送）</span><van-switch v-model="pushAlert" size="22" /></div>
>           <div class="config-item"><span>普通推送</span><van-switch v-model="pushNormal" size="22" /></div>
>           <div class="config-item">
>             <span>每日最多推送数</span>
>             <div class="config-stepper"><span class="stepper-btn" @click="maxPush > 1 && maxPush--">−</span><span class="stepper-val">{{ maxPush }}</span><span class="stepper-btn" @click="maxPush++">+</span></div>
>           </div>
>         </div>
> 
>         <div class="config-section">
>           <div class="config-section-title"><span>关注事件管理</span><span class="add-btn" @click="openAddEvent">+ 添加</span></div>
>           <div class="event-tip">开启关注后，仅关注的事件会推送通知和列入日报</div>
>           <div v-for="(evt, i) in events" :key="i" class="event-item">
>             <div class="event-left"><div class="event-name">{{ evt.name }}</div><div class="event-keywords">{{ evt.keywords.join('、') }}</div></div>
>             <van-switch v-model="evt.enabled" size="20" />
>             <van-icon name="edit" size="16" color="#6B7280" @click="openEditEvent(i)" />
>             <van-icon name="delete" size="16" color="#EA4335" @click="deleteEvent(i)" />
>           </div>
>         </div>
>         <div style="height:20px"></div>
>       </div>
>     </template>
> 
>     <!-- 支付弹窗 -->
>     <van-popup v-model:show="showPay" position="bottom" round>
>       <div class="pay-popup">
>         <div class="popup-header"><h3>{{ isActivated ? '续费' : '确认开通' }}</h3><van-icon name="cross" size="20" @click="showPay = false" /></div>
>         <div class="pay-amount">{{ selectedPlan === 'basic' ? '¥9.9' : '¥19.9' }}</div>
>         <div class="pay-plan">/月 · {{ selectedPlan === 'basic' ? '全能AI' : '全能AI Pro' }}</div>
>         <div class="pay-devices" v-if="!isActivated">已选设备：{{ selectedDevices.length }} 台</div>
>         <div class="pay-options">
>           <div :class="['pay-option', { selected: payMethod === 'wechat' }]" @click="payMethod = 'wechat'"><div class="pay-icon" style="background:#07C160"><van-icon name="wechat" size="18" color="#fff" /></div><span>微信支付</span><div class="radio"></div></div>
>           <div :class="['pay-option', { selected: payMethod === 'alipay' }]" @click="payMethod = 'alipay'"><div class="pay-icon" style="background:#1677FF"><van-icon name="alipay" size="18" color="#fff" /></div><span>支付宝</span><div class="radio"></div></div>
>         </div>
>         <van-button block type="primary" @click="confirmPay">{{ isActivated ? '确认续费' : '确认支付' }}</van-button>
>       </div>
>     </van-popup>
> 
>     <!-- 升级弹窗 -->
>     <van-popup v-model:show="showUpgrade" position="bottom" round :style="{ height: '40%' }">
>       <div class="upgrade-popup">
>         <div class="popup-header"><h3>升级全能AI Pro</h3><van-icon name="cross" size="20" @click="showUpgrade = false" /></div>
>         <div class="upgrade-feats"><div class="ufeat">🔓 解锁 AI 搜索功能</div><div class="ufeat">📋 日报免费次数升级至 20次/月</div><div class="ufeat">📊 更详细的关注事件分析</div></div>
>         <van-button block type="primary" @click="handleUpgrade">立即升级 — ¥19.9/月</van-button>
>       </div>
>     </van-popup>
> 
>     <!-- 添加/编辑关注弹窗 -->
>     <van-dialog v-model:show="showAddDialog" title="关注事件" show-cancel-button @confirm="saveEvent" :before-close="validateEvent">
>       <div class="edit-dialog">
>         <div class="edit-field"><div class="edit-label">关注名称</div><input v-model="editingName" class="edit-input" placeholder="e.g. 奶奶的活动" /></div>
>         <div class="edit-field"><div class="edit-label">关键词（多个用逗号分隔）</div><input v-model="editingKeywords" class="edit-input" placeholder="奶奶, 老人, 拐杖" /></div>
>       </div>
>     </van-dialog>
> 
>     <!-- ===== 状态切换面板（调试用） ===== -->
>     <div class="dev-panel" @click.stop>
>       <div class="dev-toggle" @click="showDevPanel = !showDevPanel">⚙</div>
>       <div class="dev-body" v-show="showDevPanel">
>         <div class="dev-title">状态切换</div>
>         <div
>           v-for="s in devStatuses"
>           :key="s.key"
>           :class="['dev-option', { active: s.key === currentDevKey }]"
>           @click="switchStatus(s.key)"
>         >{{ s.label }}</div>
>       </div>
>     </div>
>   </div>
> </template>
> 
> <script setup>
> import { ref, reactive, onMounted } from 'vue'
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
> 
> const router = useRouter()
> const goBack = () => router.back()
> 
> // ===== 状态管理（由dev面板控制） =====
> const isActivated = ref(true)
> const planType = ref('basic')
> const selectedPlan = ref('basic')
> const payMethod = ref('wechat')
> const showPay = ref(false)
> const showUpgrade = ref(false)
> const remainReports = ref(5)
> const validUntil = ref('2026-05-28')
> 
> // 推送设置
> const pushAlert = ref(true)
> const pushNormal = ref(true)
> const maxPush = ref(5)
> 
> // 关注事件
> const showAddDialog = ref(false)
> const editingIndex = ref(-1)
> const editingName = ref('')
> const editingKeywords = ref('')
> 
> const events = reactive([
>   { name: '人员经过', keywords: ['人', '来人', '客人'], enabled: true },
>   { name: '宠物活动', keywords: ['猫', '狗', '宠物'], enabled: true },
>   { name: '告警', keywords: ['告警', '异常', '入侵'], enabled: true }
> ])
> 
> const deviceList = ref([
>   { id: 'frontdoor', name: 'Front Door' },
>   { id: 'backyard', name: 'Backyard' },
>   { id: 'garage', name: 'Garage' }
> ])
> const selectedDevices = ref(['frontdoor', 'backyard', 'garage'])
> 
> const toggleDevice = (id) => {
>   const idx = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(id)
>   if (idx > -1) selectedDevices.value.splice(idx, 1)
>   else selectedDevices.value.push(id)
> }
> 
> const confirmPay = () => { showPay.value = false; if (!isActivated.value) isActivated.value = true }
> const handleUpgrade = () => { showUpgrade.value = false; planType.value = 'pro'; remainReports.value = 20 }
> 
> const openAddEvent = () => {
>   editingIndex.value = -1; editingName.value = ''; editingKeywords.value = ''; showAddDialog.value = true
> }
> const openEditEvent = (i) => {
>   editingIndex.value = i; editingName.value = events[i].name; editingKeywords.value = events[i].keywords.join(', '); showAddDialog.value = true
> }
> const deleteEvent = (i) => { events.splice(i, 1) }
> const validateEvent = (action, done) => { if (action === 'confirm' && !editingName.value.trim()) { done(false); return } done(true) }
> const saveEvent = () => {
>   const kwArr = editingKeywords.value.split(/[,，]/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean)
>   const evt = { name: editingName.value.trim(), keywords: kwArr, enabled: true }
>   if (editingIndex.value >= 0) events[editingIndex.value] = evt
>   else events.push(evt)
>   editingIndex.value = -1; editingName.value = ''; editingKeywords.value = ''
> }
> 
> // ===== Dev 状态切换面板 =====
> const showDevPanel = ref(false)
> 
> const devStatuses = [
>   { key: 'not_activated', label: '未开通全能AI' },
>   { key: 'activated_basic', label: '已开通全能AI Basic' },
>   { key: 'activated_pro', label: '已开通全能AI Pro' }
> ]
> 
> // 当前状态key，默认激活态basic
> const currentDevKey = ref('activated_basic')
> 
> const switchStatus = (key) => {
>   currentDevKey.value = key
>   switch (key) {
>     case 'not_activated':
>       isActivated.value = false
>       planType.value = 'basic'
>       break
>     case 'activated_basic':
>       isActivated.value = true
>       planType.value = 'basic'
>       remainReports.value = 5
>       break
>     case 'activated_pro':
>       isActivated.value = true
>       planType.value = 'pro'
>       remainReports.value = 20
>       break
>   }
>   showDevPanel.value = false
> }
> </script>
> 
> <style lang="scss" scoped>
> .ai-page { min-height: 100vh; background: $bg-page; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
> .ai-header { background: $bg-color; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; h2 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; flex: 1; } }
> .back-btn, .header-right { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: $bg-page; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: $text-secondary; flex-shrink: 0; }
> .scroll-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding-bottom: 80px; }
> 
> .hero-banner { margin: 16px; padding: 18px; border-radius: $radius-lg; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F2A5E, #1A73E8); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; .hero-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 26px; flex-shrink: 0; } .hero-text { flex: 1; } .title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; } .sub { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); margin-top: 4px; } }
> .cap-row { margin: 0 16px 16px; display: flex; gap: 8px; }
> .cap-card { flex: 1; background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-md; padding: 12px 8px; text-align: center; box-shadow: $shadow-card; .cap-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .cap-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } .cap-desc { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-top: 2px; } }
> .section-title { padding: 0 16px; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; }
> .plan-row { padding: 0 16px; display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
> .plan-card { flex: 1; background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; padding: 14px 12px; border: 2px solid $border-color; position: relative; transition: border-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; &.selected { border-color: $primary-color; background: $primary-bg; } &.pro { &.selected { border-color: #9C27B0; background: #F3E8FF; .plan-price { color: #9C27B0; } } .plan-badge { position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9C27B0, #7B1FA2); color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; } .plan-price { color: #9C27B0; } } .plan-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; margin-top: 4px; } .plan-price { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: $primary-color; margin-top: 6px; span { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: $text-secondary; } } .plan-feats { margin-top: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; .feat { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; } } }
> .device-check-list { margin: 0 16px 16px; background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; overflow: hidden; }
> .check-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; &:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .dev-name { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: $text-primary; } .check-box { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; border: 2px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.2s; &.checked { background: $primary-color; border-color: $primary-color; } } }
> .first-tip { margin: 0 16px; padding: 10px 14px; background: #FFF8E1; border-radius: $radius-md; font-size: 12px; color: #92400E; text-align: center; strong { font-size: 16px; } }
> .bottom-bar { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; background: $bg-color; padding: 12px 16px; padding-bottom: calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 8px)); border-top: 1px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; .price-area { .price { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: $danger-color; } .period { font-size: 13px; color: $text-secondary; } } .btn-buy { flex: 1; padding: 13px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A73E8, #1557B0); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: $radius-md; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; } }
> 
> .config { padding: 16px; padding-bottom: 80px; }
> .status-card { background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: $shadow-card; margin-bottom: 16px; }
> .status-top { padding: 16px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
> .status-plan { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; }
> .status-date { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-top: 2px; }
> .remain-area { text-align: center; .remain-num { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: $primary-color; } .remain-label { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; } }
> .upgrade-row { padding: 10px 16px; border-top: 1px solid $border-color; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; font-size: 12px; color: $primary-color; cursor: pointer; &:active { background: $bg-page; } }
> .config-section { background: $bg-card; border-radius: $radius-lg; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; box-shadow: $shadow-card; }
> .config-section-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
> .add-btn { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: $primary-color; cursor: pointer; }
> .config-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-light; font-size: 13px; color: $text-primary; &:last-child { border-bottom: none; } }
> .config-stepper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
> .stepper-btn { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: $bg-page; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; color: $text-primary; cursor: pointer; }
> .stepper-val { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; min-width: 20px; text-align: center; }
> .event-tip { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-bottom: 12px; }
> .event-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-light; &:last-child { border-bottom: none; } }
> .event-left { flex: 1; }
> .event-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; }
> .event-keywords { font-size: 11px; color: $text-secondary; margin-top: 2px; }
> 
> .pay-popup, .upgrade-popup { padding: 20px 16px 32px; }
> .popup-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: $text-primary; } }
> .pay-amount { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; color: $primary-color; }
> .pay-plan { font-size: 13px; color: $text-secondary; margin-bottom: 4px; }
> .pay-devices { font-size: 12px; color: $text-secondary; margin-bottom: 20px; }
> .pay-options { margin-bottom: 16px; }
> .pay-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 12px; border: 2px solid $border-color; border-radius: $radius-md; margin-bottom: 10px; transition: border-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; &.selected { border-color: $primary-color; } .pay-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } span { flex: 1; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } .radio { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid $border-color; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } &.selected .radio { border-color: $primary-color; background: $primary-color; &::after { content: ''; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; } } }
> .upgrade-feats { margin-bottom: 20px; }
> .ufeat { padding: 10px 0; font-size: 14px; color: $text-primary; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; }
> .edit-dialog { padding: 16px; }
> .edit-field { margin-bottom: 14px; }
> .edit-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; margin-bottom: 6px; }
> .edit-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1.5px solid $border-color; border-radius: $radius-sm; font-size: 14px; color: $text-primary; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; &:focus { border-color: $primary-color; } }
> 
> /* ===== Dev 状态切换面板 ===== */
> .dev-panel {
>   position: fixed;
>   right: 0;
>   top: 50%;
>   transform: translateY(-50%);
>   z-index: 9999;
>   display: flex;
>   flex-direction: column;
>   align-items: flex-end;
> }
> .dev-toggle {
>   width: 36px;
>   height: 36px;
>   border-radius: 18px 0 0 18px;
>   background: #1A73E8;
>   color: #fff;
>   font-size: 18px;
>   display: flex;
>   align-items: center;
>   justify-content: center;
>   cursor: pointer;
>   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
> }
> .dev-body {
>   background: #fff;
>   border-radius: 10px 0 0 10px;
>   padding: 10px 14px;
>   margin-top: 4px;
>   box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
>   min-width: 170px;
> }
> .dev-title {
>   font-size: 11px;
>   font-weight: 700;
>   color: #6B7280;
>   margin-bottom: 6px;
>   text-transform: uppercase;
>   letter-spacing: 1px;
> }
> .dev-option {
>   padding: 7px 10px;
>   font-size: 12px;
>   font-weight: 500;
>   color: #374151;
>   border-radius: 6px;
>   cursor: pointer;
>   margin-bottom: 2px;
>   transition: background 0.15s;
>   &:hover { background: #F3F4F6; }
>   &.active { background: #1A73E8; color: #fff; }
> }
> </style>

#### _Assistant_

> 把右侧浮动面板改成顶部置顶标签栏：

#### _User_

> 不是这个意思，我意思是这个切换按钮放在顶层页面，不要放在功能内部

#### _Assistant_

> 明白了，放在所有页面的最外层，比如 layout 层或者作为一个全局浮动组件，而不是写在某个功能页里面。
> 
> 这样无论你浏览 `/ai`、`/message`、`/ai/daily` 还是其他页面，顶部都有状态切换条。
> 
> 我来看 layout 的结构：

#### _Assistant_

> <template>> 
>   <div class="layout-container">> 
>     <!-- 状态栏 -->> 
>     <div class="status-bar">> 
>       <span class="time">{{ currentTime }}</span>> 
>       <div class="status-icons">> 
>         <van-icon name="wifi-o" size="15" />> 
>         <van-icon name="battery-o" size="15" />> 
>       </div>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 页面内容 -->> 
>     <div class="page-content">> 
>       <router-view v-slot="{ Component }">> 
>         <keep-alive>> 
>           <component :is="Component" />> 
>         </keep-alive>> 
>       </router-view>> 
>     </div>> 
>     > 
>     <!-- 底部导航 -->> 
>     <van-tabbar > 
>       v-if="showTabbar" > 
>       v-model="activeTab" > 
>       active-color="#1A73E8"> 
>       inactive-color="#6B7280"> 
>       :border="true"> 
>     >> 
>       <van-tabbar-item to="/home" icon="home-o">首页</van-tabbar-item>> 
>       <van-tabbar-item to="/message" icon="bell" :badge="unreadCount > 0 ? unreadCount : ''">消息</van-tabbar-item>> 
>       <van-tabbar-item to="/me" icon="user-o">我的</van-tabbar-item>> 
>     </van-tabbar>> 
>   </div>> 
> </template>> 
> > 
> <script setup>> 
> import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'> 
> import { useRoute } from 'vue-router'> 
> > 
> const route = useRoute()> 
> const activeTab = ref(0)> 
> const currentTime = ref('9:41')> 
> const unreadCount = ref(3)> 
> > 
> // 是否显示底部导航> 
> const showTabbar = computed(() => {> 
>   return route.meta.showTabbar === true> 
> })> 
> > 
> // 更新时间> 
> let timeInterval = null> 
> const updateTime = () => {> 
>   const now = new Date()> 
>   const hours = now.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0')> 
>   const minutes = now.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0')> 
>   currentTime.value = `${hours}:${minutes}`> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 根据路由更新激活的Tab> 
> const updateActiveTab = () => {> 
>   const path = route.path> 
>   if (path.includes('/home')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 0> 
>   } else if (path.includes('/message')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 1> 
>   } else if (path.includes('/me')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 2> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> onMounted(() => {> 
>   updateTime()> 
>   timeInterval = setInterval(updateTime, 60000)> 
>   updateActiveTab()> 
> })> 
> > 
> onUnmounted(() => {> 
>   if (timeInterval) {> 
>     clearInterval(timeInterval)> 
>   }> 
> })> 
> </script>> 
> > 
> <style lang="scss" scoped>> 
> .layout-container {> 
>   width: 100%;> 
>   height: 100%;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   flex-direction: column;> 
>   background-color: $bg-page;> 
> }> 
> > 
> .status-bar {> 
>   height: $status-bar-height;> 
>   background-color: $bg-color;> 
>   display: flex;> 
>   justify-content: space-between;> 
>   align-items: center;> 
>   padding: 0 16px;> 
>   flex-shrink: 0;> 
>   > 
>   .time {> 
>     font-size: 15px;> 
>     font-weight: 700;> 
>     color: $text-primary;> 
>   }> 
>   > 
>   .status-icons {> 
>     display: flex;> 
>     gap: 5px;> 
>     align-items: center;> 
>     color: $text-primary;> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> .page-content {> 
>   flex: 1;> 
>   overflow-y: auto;> 
>   overflow-x: hidden;> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 覆盖Vant Tabbar样式> 
> :deep(.van-tabbar) {> 
>   height: $tabbar-height;> 
>   padding-bottom: 10px;> 
>   > 
>   .van-tabbar-item {> 
>     font-size: 10px;> 
>     > 
>     .van-tabbar-item__icon {> 
>       font-size: 22px;> 
>       margin-bottom: 2px;> 
>     }> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> </style>>

>       </div>

> 
> <script setup>
> import { ref, reactive, inject } from 'vue'
> import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
> 
> const router = useRouter()
> const goBack = () => router.back()
> 
> // 从layout接收全局调试状态
> const aiStatus = inject('aiStatus', ref('activated_basic'))
> 
> // 根据状态切换内容
> const isActivated = ref(true)
> const planType = ref('basic')
> const remainReports = ref(5)
> 
> const syncStatus = () => {
>   const key = aiStatus.value
>   switch (key) {
>     case 'not_activated':
>       isActivated.value = false
>       planType.value = 'basic'
>       break
>     case 'activated_basic':
>       isActivated.value = true
>       planType.value = 'basic'
>       remainReports.value = 5
>       break
>     case 'activated_pro':
>       isActivated.value = true
>       planType.value = 'pro'
>       remainReports.value = 20
>       break
>   }
> }
> 
> // 监听状态变化
> import { watch } from 'vue'
> watch(aiStatus, syncStatus, { immediate: true })
> 
> const selectedPlan = ref('basic')
> const payMethod = ref('wechat')
> const showPay = ref(false)
> const showUpgrade = ref(false)
> const validUntil = ref('2026-05-28')
> 
> // 推送设置
> const pushAlert = ref(true)
> const pushNormal = ref(true)
> const maxPush = ref(5)
> 
> // 关注事件
> const showAddDialog = ref(false)
> const editingIndex = ref(-1)
> const editingName = ref('')
> const editingKeywords = ref('')
> 
> const events = reactive([
>   { name: '人员经过', keywords: ['人', '来人', '客人'], enabled: true },
>   { name: '宠物活动', keywords: ['猫', '狗', '宠物'], enabled: true },
>   { name: '告警', keywords: ['告警', '异常', '入侵'], enabled: true }
> ])
> 
> const deviceList = ref([
>   { id: 'frontdoor', name: 'Front Door' },
>   { id: 'backyard', name: 'Backyard' },
>   { id: 'garage', name: 'Garage' }
> ])
> const selectedDevices = ref(['frontdoor', 'backyard', 'garage'])
> 
> const toggleDevice = (id) => {
>   const idx = selectedDevices.value.indexOf(id)
>   if (idx > -1) selectedDevices.value.splice(idx, 1)
>   else selectedDevices.value.push(id)
> }
> 
> const openAddEvent = () => {
>   editingIndex.value = -1; editingName.value = ''; editingKeywords.value = ''; showAddDialog.value = true
> }
> const openEditEvent = (i) => {
>   editingIndex.value = i; editingName.value = events[i].name; editingKeywords.value = events[i].keywords.join(', '); showAddDialog.value = true
> }
> const deleteEvent = (i) => { events.splice(i, 1) }
> const validateEvent = (action, done) => { if (action === 'confirm' && !editingName.value.trim()) { done(false); return } done(true) }
> const saveEvent = () => {
>   const kwArr = editingKeywords.value.split(/[,，]/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean)
>   const evt = { name: editingName.value.trim(), keywords: kwArr, enabled: true }
>   if (editingIndex.value >= 0) events[editingIndex.value] = evt
>   else events.push(evt)
>   editingIndex.value = -1; editingName.value = ''; editingKeywords.value = ''
> }
> 
> // 注意：当dev状态切换时需同步planType，已通过watch(aiStatus)自动处理
> // 但支付后或升级后的手动变更也需要同步
> const handlePayAndActivate = () => { showPay.value = false; if (!isActivated.value) isActivated.value = true }
> const handleUpgrade = () => { showUpgrade.value = false; planType.value = 'pro'; remainReports.value = 20 }
> </script>

> 看 layout 代码没问题，`provide('aiStatus', currentDevKey)` 传递的是 `ref` 对象。
> 
> 问题可能出在 `inject` 时 layout 和 ai/index 的层级关系——`router-view` 在 layout 中通过 `<keep-alive>` 包裹。也许 inject 没拿到正确的值。
> 
> 换个更直接的方式：不在 layout 里 provide/inject，而是用 **vue-router 的 query 参数**来传状态。这样任何页面都可以通过 `route.query` 读到。

#### _Assistant_

> 找到原因了——`aiStatus` 是 `import { aiStatus } from '@/store/devStatus'` 导入的 ref，在 `<script setup>` 中虽然在模板会自动解包，但 `s.key === aiStatus.value` 这种写法会正常解包，问题可能是 `aiStatus.value` 返回的是字符串，但类型不匹配导致活跃项始终显示不对。
> 
> 让我检查一下——可能在模板里 `aiStatus` 不会被自动解包因为它是 import 进来的，不是 setup 返回的顶层 ref。在 Vue3 中，只有 setup 返回的顶层 ref 会解包，**import 导入的 ref 不会自动解包**。
> 
> 所以 `aiStatus.value` 是对的，但问题是为什么没有选中效果……

> <script setup>> 
> import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'> 
> import { useRoute } from 'vue-router'> 
> import { aiStatus } from '@/store/devStatus'> 
> > 
> const route = useRoute()> 
> const activeTab = ref(0)> 
> const currentTime = ref('9:41')>

> // ===== 全局状态切换（调试用） =====> 
> const showDevPanel = ref(false)> 
> const devStatuses = [> 
>   { key: 'not_activated', label: '未开通AI' },> 
>   { key: 'activated_basic', label: '已开通Basic' },> 
>   { key: 'activated_pro', label: '已开通Pro' }> 
> ]> 
> > 
> const switchStatus = (key) => {> 
>   aiStatus.value = key> 
>   showDevPanel.value = false> 
> }>

> > 
> > 
> // 是否显示底部导航> 
> const showTabbar = computed(() => {> 
>   return route.meta.showTabbar === true> 
> })> 
> > 
> // 更新时间> 
> let timeInterval = null> 
> const updateTime = () => {> 
>   const now = new Date()> 
>   const hours = now.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0')> 
>   const minutes = now.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0')> 
>   currentTime.value = `${hours}:${minutes}`> 
> }> 
> > 
> // 根据路由更新激活的Tab> 
> const updateActiveTab = () => {> 
>   const path = route.path> 
>   if (path.includes('/home')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 0> 
>   } else if (path.includes('/message')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 1> 
>   } else if (path.includes('/me')) {> 
>     activeTab.value = 2> 
>   }> 
> }> 
> > 
> onMounted(() => {>

#### _Assistant_

> 我看到了——文件缩进有问题，很多内容前面多了8个空格。而且 `aiStatus` 是 import 的 ref，在模板中不会自动解包，要用 `.value`。但 `s.key === aiStatus.value` 应该有效……
> 
> 等等，再次检查：`s.key === aiStatus.value`，切换时执行 `aiStatus.value = key`，确实是字符串相等。选中效果可能没显示是因为 `scoped` 样式的问题——面板在 layout 中，但 `dev-option` 的 `.active` 样式可能被 scoped 限制了匹配。
> 
> 有个简单方法——把 `aiStatus.value` 赋值给一个本地 computed：

> 现在用 `currentKey` (computed) 替代 `aiStatus.value`，这是 Vue3 模板自动解包的顶层 ref/computed，应该能正确显示选中的蓝色高亮效果了。你刷新试试。

>           <div :class="['pay-option', { selected: payMethod === 'alipay' }]" @click="payMethod = 'alipay'"><div class="pay-icon" style="background:#1677FF"><van-icon name="alipay" size="18" color="#fff" /></div><span>支付宝</span><div class="radio"></div></div>

>         <div class="upgrade-feats"><div class="ufeat">🔓 解锁 AI 搜索功能</div><div class="ufeat">📋 日报免费次数升级至 20次/月</div><div class="ufeat">📊 更详细的关注事件分析</div></div>
>         <van-button block type="primary" @click="handleUpgrade">立即升级 — ¥19.9/月</van-button>
>       </div>
>     </van-popup>
